title: 2026-06-19 Osaka Orchid Friday Rev2
summary: Rev2 Osaka set for the 2026-06-19 date seed, using concrete Osaka activity spaces, varied ages, legwear, footwear, and social Friday movement after separating earlier character-day experiments into their own album pool.
summaryJa: 大阪のアルバム。色の軸はオーキッドクローム。構成はマーケット、ミュージアム、イベント会場。
